---
title: "vault.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\vault.py"
loc: 82
complexity: 12
logic_score: 3.10
style_score: 3.64
intel_score: 7.25
overall_score: 3.92
---

## Intent
The `vault.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on SovereignVault, __init__, _ensure_master_key, shield, rotate, get_secrets_map, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SovereignVault, __init__, _ensure_master_key, shield, rotate, get_secrets_map, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [cryptography.fernet](file://cryptography.fernet)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `SovereignVault`
- `__init__`
- `_ensure_master_key`
- `shield`
- `rotate`
- `get_secrets_map`
- `main`
